/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/user_ball_test.dir/tests/user_ball_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/user_ball_test.dir/src/math/Vector2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/user_ball_test.dir/src/physics/Body2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/user_ball_test.dir/src/physics/PhysicsWorld2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/user_ball_test.dir/src/collision/Collision2D.cpp.o -o user_ball_test  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib
